userMessage: i need basic commands to check my cope is working like options? and IDN and few other u can think of?

response.text:
I built a basic scope health-check flow with verified common commands and left out the unverified options query.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a basic scope health-check flow with verified common commands and left out the unverified options query.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Options query was not added because it is not verified in the current source set.","Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Basic Scope Health Check","description":"Basic Tektronix scope communication and status checks for MSO4/5/6 series.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"id":"g_auto_1","type":"group","label":"Operation","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Basic comms and status checks: clear errors, read IDN, check ESR, check OPC, and poll the error queue."},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Result","params":{"command":"*IDN?","saveAs":"idn_response"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Result","params":{"command":"*ESR?","saveAs":"event_status"},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Result","params":{"command":"*OPC?","saveAs":"operation_complete"},"id":"s1_6"}]},{"id":"g_auto_2","type":"group","label":"Setup","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"write","label":"Write","params":{"command":"*CLS"},"id":"s1_3"}]},{"id":"g_auto_3","type":"group","label":"Validation / Error Check","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"},"id":"s1_7"}]},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_8"}]}}]}
